name: Pengana International Equities Limited
analysis: PIA has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.2545. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.2520 where 5 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.2545, stop A$1.2128, target A$1.2850. Risk/reward is 0.73:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
